title: MMS Psychology
imageAlt: MMS Psychology social preview featuring the Sam Mary Moscovitz logo on white brick
summary: A website I built for MMS Psychology, including service information, fees and online booking.
description:
I built this website for MMS Psychology. The main goal was to make the important information easy to find and give clients a straightforward way to book an appointment.

You can use the live site below without leaving this page.

title: Football Management Panel
imageAlt: Football Management Panel application interface running beside the Java project workspace
summary: An educational JavaFX desktop application for football managers to organise teams, players and positions.
description:
This was an educational project built around a larger Java codebase. It gives football managers a place to manage their teams, assign players to positions on the field, move players between teams and switch to an available team using manager IDs.

It also gave me experience with exception handling and building a multi-screen desktop interface with JavaFX.

title: FileDrop
imageAlt: FileDrop parachute logo on a sky-blue background
summary: A tool for sharing files between Mac and Windows computers over the same Wi-Fi network.
description:
FileDrop lets you send files directly between Mac and Windows computers on the same Wi-Fi or Ethernet network, without accounts or cloud storage.

Under the hood, the desktop app is built with Tauri. The Angular and TypeScript frontend handles the single-page interface, nearby device list, file selection and transfer progress, while the Rust backend handles local-network discovery and the file transfers themselves. Devices advertise over mDNS, then transfer files directly over a TCP connection. The receiver can accept or deny the request, and Tauri events pass transfer status and progress back to the Angular interface.

The project is still in development. The latest code and progress are on GitHub.

title: Labs Check App
imageAlt: Labs App icon and name on a dark navy banner
summary: A low-key operations app that helps a sup keep daily checks, notes and routine tasks moving.
description:
I built Labs Check App with Microsoft Power Apps, using plenty of Power Fx and a small amount of JavaScript. It connects to cloud data through Dataverse and Excel, keeping everyday records and updates in one place.

It helps streamline and manage a lot of the daily tasks handled by a sup :).
